---
title: "Aflevering"
author: "Christian Præst Møller"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
---
Opgave 4
```{r}
n <- 100000
u <- runif(n,0,1)
lambda <- 0.01
eta <- 0.05
beta <- 0.1
xo <- 5
svar <- numeric(n)
hthxo <- lambda*xo+eta*(exp(beta*xo)-1)

for(i in (1:n)) {
  lign <- function(x)  {
  lambda*x+eta*(exp(beta*x)-1)-(lambda*xo+eta*(exp(beta*xo)-1))+log(1-u[i])}
  svar[i] <- uniroot(function(x) lign(x), lower = -1, upper = 100, tol = 1e-9)$root
}
svar

ford <- function(x) (lambda+eta*beta*exp(beta*x))*exp(-(lambda*x+eta*(exp(beta*x)-1)))

hist(svar,probability=TRUE)
curve(ford, add=TRUE)
```
```{r}
l <- function(x) log((lambda+eta*beta*exp(beta*x))*exp(-(lambda*x+eta*(exp(beta*x)-1))))
score <- c(((eta*beta*x*exp(beta*x)+eta*exp(beta*x))/(lambda+eta*beta*exp(beta*x)))-eta*x*exp(beta*x)+eta*beta*xo*exp(beta*xo), ((beta*exp(beta*x))/(lambda+eta*beta*exp(beta*x)))-(exp(beta*x)-exp(beta*xo)),
           (1/(lambda+eta*beta*exp(beta*x)))-(x-x0)
```
